file_insights.changes: Added 452 lines of comprehensive unit tests
file_insights.scope: Tests for DumbRenderer::render_section_header, render_card_row, render_progress, render_footer, and format_duration; integration test for full render_board
file_insights.complexity: Medium - 45+ test cases covering nominal cases, edge cases, and invariants

patterns_discovered.description: card() builder creates CardView with sensible defaults; assert_ascii_only() and assert_no_ansi() verify output constraints
Tests grouped by logical component (headers, markers, content, progress, footer, duration) with clear comment separators
patterns_discovered.evidence: Comment sections '── Section header ──', '── Card row markers ──', etc.

patterns_discovered.description: Every render function tested for ASCII-only and ANSI-free output as mandatory constraints
patterns_discovered.evidence: assert_ascii_only() and assert_no_ansi() called in tests for all public functions

patterns_discovered.description: Tests verify zero values, optional fields, boundary conditions (0%, 100%), and field visibility rules

gotchas_discovered.description: When progress is 0%, the percentage marker should not appear in card rows (row_hides_zero_progress test)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Display clarity - avoids clutter for cards with unknown progress

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Exit code display conditional on state
gotchas_discovered.description: Exit codes only shown when state is 'failed'; hidden for 'done' or other successful states (row_hides_exit_code_on_non_failed test)
gotchas_discovered.impact: State-dependent output formatting prevents misleading information

gotchas_discovered.description: No box-drawing, block characters, or unicode allowed - verified by assert_ascii_only checking each character is ASCII
format_duration(134) yields '2m14s' not '2m' - always includes seconds with zero-padding
gotchas_discovered.impact: Consistent time display format across all durations

approach_details.strategy: Implemented comprehensive unit test suite covering all public render functions in DumbRenderer
approach_details.execution: Added 45+ test cases organized into 6 logical sections with helper functions for common assertions
approach_details.verification: Tests verify correct marker format ([>], [ ], [x], [!]), ASCII-only output, absence of ANSI sequences, optional field visibility, and footer aggregation
approach_details.integration: Full integration test (full_board_ascii_only) verifies render_board() assembles all components correctly with proper section headers and stats

recommendations.suggestion: Extract assert_ascii_only() and assert_no_ansi() to shared test module; these patterns will recur in ColorRenderer and other render backends
Use card() builder pattern as template for other render test suites; reduces boilerplate for CardView construction across tests
Run `cargo tarpaulin` to confirm 100% line/branch coverage of render/dumb.rs; integration test at end is good practice but verify nothing is skipped
ColorRenderer and UnicodeRenderer can adopt same test structure (header/marker/content/progress/footer sections) with invariant assertions swapped (colors allowed, unicode allowed)
